description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in business attire, featuring a collared shirt with a subtle pattern, a black necktie, and beige trousers secured with a black belt. The figure has short, neatly combed hair and a clean-shaven face, presenting a professional appearance. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly apart. The shoes are formal and dark, complementing the overall business look. The shirt is buttoned up, and the trousers have a tailored fit, giving the figure a polished and tidy silhouette. The overall proportions and posture suggest a typical urban pedestrian, likely encountered in office districts or city streets.
description: A stylized adult male in business attire with a collared shirt, tie, beige trousers, and formal shoes, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has short, neatly combed hair and a professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the patterned shirt, black tie, facial features, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight posture, and the side seam of the trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, belt, and trousers, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the straight posture, and the side seam of the trousers.
attribute_clothing_type: business shirt with necktie and tailored trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
